query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, tm.teamRole, tm.tenantId FROM users u LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Daniel%' OR u.email LIKE '%daniel%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, tm.teamRole, tm.tenantId FROM users u LEFT JOIN team_members tm ON tm.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Daniel%' OR u.email LIKE '%daniel%'
